title: UFO
questions: What springs to mind when you hear the abbreviation "UFO'?
What do the letters UFO stand for?
After a UFO has been identified, is it then an IFO?
Do you think UFOs exist, out there, somewhere?
What would you do if a UFO landed in a park near your house?
What do you think UFOs look like? Are they the flying saucers you see in movies?
What would the world do if it knew a UFO would arrive on Earth in the middle of next month?
What's your favourite movie or book about UFOs?
What do you think is inside a UFO?
Do you hope there are UFOs and they will visit Earth one day?
Have you ever seen a UFO?
What are your early memories of UFOs? Were you scared?
Do you think UFOs would come to Earth to attack us, make friends with us, to get some natural resources, or another reason?
Why are people so fascinated by UFOs?
Do you think governments should spend lots more money looking for signs of UFOs in the universe?
What do you think when people report UFO sightings?
Do you have any good UFO stories?
Do you think it's possible there are UFOs and the world's governments are keeping it a secret?
Would you accept an offer from aliens of a ride in their UFO?
How would our world change if we received regular visits from UFOs?
